_comment: Project config. Fork this repo, edit this file + searches/*.json + your .env, and you have your own job-search toolkit. Nothing personal is hardcoded.
_remote_only_comment: When true: only remote jobs survive. jobspy fetches remote-only; all sources are post-filtered to keep only postings whose text signals remote, and the legitimacy filter rejects misleading-remote postings harder.

jobspy._comment: Region for the jobspy source. `country` is REQUIRED for Indeed (it routes to that country's Indeed site) — use a country name like usa/uk/canada/sweden. `location` is an optional city/region within it.

legitimacy._comment: The 4-layer 'is this job real?' filter. Only postings that PASS are pushed.

fit_scoring._comment: The original 'does this job match me?' scorer. Set enabled=false to push purely on legitimacy.
